objective: Rebuild Sage prompt end to end around a lean manifest-driven Code Mode prompt stack and clean out the legacy prompt architecture.
success_criteria: Replace the XML-style prompt contract with a lean Markdown core plus trusted and untrusted context frames.
Use one prompt builder path for foreground turns and LangGraph resumes.
Align prompt capability teaching with the bridge manifest and current actor authority.
Remove prompt-era legacy wording from tests and architecture docs.
constraints: Keep runtime_execute_code as the only public execution tool.
Do not add a compatibility layer for the old prompt format.
Update CHANGELOG.md for all src and docs work in this unit.

milestones.title: Capture intake snapshot and touched scope
notes: Work item scaffolded from the local workflow generator.

milestones.title: Implement the scoped changes
notes: Added a dedicated prompt package with builder, capability snapshot helpers, and prompt types.
Rewired runChatTurn and LangGraph prompt assembly onto one builder path.
Removed the old monolithic prompt implementation in favor of prompt package exports.

milestones.title: Run validation and publish the completion report
notes: Full repository validation stack passed, including check:trust:deep.

progress.summary: Created the local work item scaffold.
Replaced the XML prompt contract with a Markdown core plus trusted and untrusted prompt frames.
Finished doc/test cleanup and completed the full validation stack.

decision_log.decision: Keep promptContract.ts as a compatibility export surface while moving the actual implementation into src/features/agent-runtime/prompt/.
decision_log.rationale: This preserves import stability while still completing the hard-cut replacement of the monolithic prompt implementation.

decision_log.decision: Keep full rich capability details in runtime introspection, but trim the prompt snapshot to a leaner manifest-derived method list so the trusted frame stays compact.
decision_log.rationale: The prompt needs a compact capability map for planning, while admin.runtime.getCapabilities() can still carry the richer operator-facing detail.

discoveries.summary: runChatTurn was still seeding prompt scaffolding into graph state before the hard-cut cleanup.
evidence: agentRuntime.ts passed promptEnvelope.messages into graph startup while langgraph/runtime.ts also rebuilt prompt prelude messages on model turns.

discoveries.summary: Transcript injection tests were asserting against old XML-tagged graph-seeded prompt messages rather than the current prompt envelope.
evidence: tests/unit/features/awareness/transcriptInjection.test.ts parsed XML tags from graph input messages instead of validating result.debug.messages from the new prompt builder.

validation_strategy: Run targeted Vitest suites for prompt contract and transcript continuity behavior.
Run full lint, test, build, docs, artifact validation, workflow audit, and deep trust checks.
notes: Prompt JSON frames are now intentionally compact rather than pretty-printed.
